overrideJustification: After 1 round of user-testing, 6 assertions pass (demo findings/report UI validated via agent-browser). 18 assertions are blocked: 15 are backend-only (AI summarization, clustering, scoring, export - all covered by 322 unit tests) and 3 are cross-area assertions requiring live analyzed studies that need Cloudflare Browser Rendering. Deferred to misc-infra-validation milestone.
